question: Below are the stored routines in scope for this change. The graph captures STATIC dependency edges — foreign keys and declared EXEC calls — but a routine that assembles and runs SQL at run time can reference a table that NO static edge records. Which of the scoped routines carry such a dynamic-SQL table dependency, invisible to static edges? List every routine that is a blind spot, comma-separated.
answerFormat: Comma-separated, alphabetically sorted list of unqualified routine names, drawn from the scope list, whose dynamic SQL hides a table dependency (e.g. "usp_x").
